_comment: One file per procedure_code. Distilled from the matching pair in PM JAY/Standard Treatment Guideline/master/<condition>/ : _Medco.pdf (clinical + mandatory docs) + _PPD.CPD.pdf (PPD/CPD processing checklists). Filename = procedure_code. This is what the Documentation Checker, Query Predictor, and Medical Justification agents read AFTER the picker has chosen the code.
procedure_name: CT for Soft Tissue Sarcoma (Ifosfamide + Adriamycin)
min_doctor_qualification: M.Ch. or DM (Medical oncology) or equivalent
clinical_indications: TNM 8th ed, Stages I-III and selected Stage IV (pulmonary metastasis treated with curative intent)
Soft tissue sarcoma neoadjuvant, adjuvant and metastatic

preauth.label: Clinical notes with documentation of relevant history
Investigations- CBC, LFT, RFT, RBS, local & chest X-ray, MRI (of affected region)

claim.label: Mandatory parameters to be monitored: Haemogram, cardiac, renal and hepatic functioning.
Reports of the tests (pathology, radiology, microbiology, hematology, biochemistry, etc.)
Discharge summary of day care department

ppd_preauth.q: Any soft tissue lump exhibiting clinical features (Increasing in size, Size >5 cm, Deep to the deep fascia, Painful) that should be considered malignant until proved otherwise?

common_queries: Soft tissue lump clinical features (increasing size, >5cm, deep to fascia, painful) not documented or not indicating malignancy
Clinical notes with relevant history are missing or incomplete at pre-authorization
Investigations (CBC, LFT, RFT, RBS, local & chest X-ray, MRI (of affected region)) are missing or incomplete at pre-authorization
Bar code of the drugs is missing at claim submission
Mandatory parameters monitored (Haemogram, cardiac, renal and hepatic functioning) are not documented at claim submission

additional_information.post_op_care: Physiotherapy rehabilitation post-operatively, follow-up every 6 months for first 5 years and annual follow-up after every 5 years with clinical evaluation (examination of local area), radiological evaluation (X-ray of the local part and Chest) and functional evaluation (using special scores like Musculoskeletal Tumor Society (MSTS) scoring, etc.)
